voxtral-mini-2602.pricingNotes: Mistral lists Voxtral Mini Transcribe at $0.002/min, stored as $0.12/hr. Free credits, discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: Mistral's /v1/audio/transcriptions endpoint supports file, file_id, and file_url inputs. Current docs publish an approximately 3-hour audio-length cap for Voxtral Mini Transcribe 2, and the Known limitations page lists a 500 MB maximum file size for audio transcription. AutoShow uses those documented limits directly.
